name: Sanjay Mehrotra
background: Sanjay Mehrotra is President and Chief Executive Officer at Micron Technology. He joined Micron in 2017 after a long career at SanDisk Corporation, which he co-founded and where he served as President and CEO from 2011 to 2016.

commpanies.name: Micron Technology, Inc.
commpanies.title_or_role: Director, President and Chief Executive Officer
